title: Hashi API switch and WatchTower-backed hard restart

orchestrator.responsibility: scope, dispatch, integration, checks, commits, closeout

request: Implement Hashi /api runtime command with Telegram buttons/default API model, and /restart hard restart command backed by WatchTower restart supervision upgrade. Lulu is worker, Akane is reviewer, Zelda orchestrates using auto_vibe_coding.
exit_condition: Hashi exposes /api on/off/model with buttons, status includes API address and default model; WatchTower exposes restart supervision endpoint/state/audit; Hashi /restart confirms via buttons, notifies WatchTower, and has focused tests plus recorded verification evidence.

api.tests: pytest -q tests/test_api_gateway_command.py tests/test_command_registry.py tests/test_runtime_command_binding.py => 14 passed, 2 pytz warnings

tests: /mnt/c/Users/thene/projects/HASHI: pytest -q tests/test_api_gateway_runtime.py tests/test_api_restart_commands.py tests/test_remote_rescue_tool.py tests/test_command_registry.py tests/test_runtime_command_binding.py => 29 passed, 2 pytz warnings
orchestrator_fixes: Unauthorized Telegram callbacks now answer with an alert
/restart fails closed when WatchTower status is unavailable or rejected
Confirm re-checks WatchTower availability before dispatch
Duplicate hardrestart confirm is rejected while a restart is in flight
WatchTower now writes durable restart_id state records under state/restarts and exposes a restart status endpoint
